name: Scrape and summarize news site posts with AI
description: Scrapes a news site with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract and summarize articles, and saves structured results to a Notion database. Adapted from n8n's scrape-and-summarize news workflow.

source.originalName: Scrape and summarize posts of a news site without RSS feed using AI and save them to a NocoDB

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for saving articles

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for digest notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for news digest

newsUrl.description: URL of the news site to scrape (e.g. 'https://techcrunch.com')

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID where article summaries will be saved

maxArticles.description: Maximum number of articles to summarize

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for article extraction and summarization
Build Notion page content from summaries
Build Slack Block Kit news digest
